slots.name: subhead
slots.copy: A simpler way to see the collection — built for how you actually look.

rationale: A single centered monumental bookend per the variety directive: the stack archetype holds one colossal didone display line 'Everything in one place' centered on the dark inverse-strong surface with calm authority. Repair fix — moved the hero from surface/inverse (#3A2F23) to surface/inverse-strong so it no longer renders on the flagged brand surface bg while remaining the sanctioned inverse bookend that carries the lone accent on its display title. A short eyebrow sits above and two quiet typographic links (arrow 'Start free' + slash 'See how it works') sit below — no buttons, no split, no collage. Centering is legal here because this is the conversion/bookend stack; all neverDo invariants (no radius, no shadows, no gradients, no boxed controls, single accent on inverse) are respected.
